programs.title: Backcountry Rescue
programs.desc: Defying posted warnings, a snowboarder ventures into high-risk avalanche territory-and pays the price  the SAR team faces a race against weather and terrain to extract him safely.

programs.title: Backcountry Rescue
programs.desc: Avalanche risk turns deadly after a skier is caught in unstable snow  the SAR team must use helicopters and controlled detonations to prevent further slides before attempting the rescue.

programs.title: Backcountry Rescue
programs.desc: Several responders race to rescue an injured snowboarder  we also see how they juggle family dinners, day jobs, and sleepless nights.

programs.title: Backcountry Rescue
programs.desc: Chris and Dee Hathaway, a married couple deeply committed to rescue work in the Tetons, must help a skier who suffers a suspected spinal injury in the backcountry.

programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: Officers suspect an IT consultant has arrived for more than just a holiday  a surfer returns from Southeast Asia with a strange souvenir.

programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: A Korean bride-to-be tries to enter Canada as a tourist  the Marine Enforcement Team tackles a massive Japanese freighter carrying an illegal passenger.
